name: Orange Pecan Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter until smooth.
2. Add the egg and beat well.
3. Incorporate the grated orange rind, orange juice, and sifted dry ingredients.
4. Mix in the chopped pecans until combined.
5. Shape into a roll (or rolls) and wrap in wax paper.
6. Refrigerate for several hours or overnight.
7. Slice with a sharp knife into thin pieces.
8. Place on greased cookie sheets.
9. Bake at 400 degrees Fahrenheit for about 8 to 10 minutes.
10. Makes approximately 4 dozen cookies.
